verses.text: “Tua hun ciangin vantung ki-ukna zia pen zinei thakpa a uap dingin a meivak uh tawh a pai nungak sawmte tawh kibang ding hi
Nungak sawmte sung panin nga pil uh a, nga hai uh hi
Tua a haite in a meivak sung uhah a tui thunthuah lopi-in pai uh a
ahi zongin a pil nungak ngate in a dimtakin thunin a pai uh hi
Zineipa hong tunghak ahih manin a vekpi-un lusu-in a ihmu uh hi
Ahi zongin zankim tak ciangin, ‘Zineipa hong tungta ding hi. Va dawn un,’ ci-in hong kiko hi
Tua nungakte zong tho-in a meivak uh hong puah ciat uh hi
Tua ciangin a haite in a pilte kiangah, ‘Ka mei uh mitta ahih manin na meitui uh hong hawm un,’ a cih ciangin
a pilte in, ‘Hong hawm le ung ko-a' ding tawh kicing nawnlo ding ahih manin no-a' ding va leitawm zaw un,’ ci-in a dawng uh hi
Meitui lei dingin amaute a paikhiat kal sungin zineipa hong tung hi. A kigingsa-in a om nungakte in zineipa dawnin mopawi bawlna sungah a lutkhawm pah uh hi. Tua khit ciangin kong kikhak hi
Tua khit ciangin nungak haite zong hong tung uh a, ‘Topa, Topa aw, kong hong hon' in,’ a cih uh ciangin
amah in, ‘Note ka hong thei het kei hi,’ na cihsan hi
“Tua ahih manin a ni leh a hun theilo na hih manun na pilvang un.”
“Inn panin khualzin dingin a paikhia mipa tawh zong kibang hi. Amah in a nasemte samin, a neihsateng a nasemte' kep dingin a ap hi
Amau' siamna tawh kizui-in khat tungah tul nga, khat tungah tul nih, khat tungah tul khat a ap khit ciangin a zinkhia hi
Tul nga a ngahpa in sum bawlna-in zangpah a, a meet tul nga mah a ngahthuah hi
Tul nih a ngahpa in zong a meet tul nih mah a ngahthuah hi
Ahi zongin tul khat a ngahpa in leisung to-in a topa' sum a selcip hi
“Hun sawtpi khit ciangin tua nasemte' topa hong ciahkik a, a nasemte tawh a sum thu a siangsak uh hi
Tul nga a ngahpa in a dang tul nga mah hong tawithuahin, ‘Topa aw, kei tungah tul nga nong ap hi. Hih lai-ah tul nga mah ka meetsak hi,’ hong cih ciangin
a topa in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi; a hoih a citak nasempa aw, a tawmno na zekna-ah siam na hih manin a tampi tak ka hong zeksak ding hi. Hong pai in; kei tawh nuamsa khawm ni,’ a ci hi
Tua ciangin tul nih a ngahpa zong hong pai-in, ‘Topa aw, kei tungah tul nih nong ap hi. Hih lai-ah tul nih mah ka na meetsak hi,’ hong cih ciangin
a topa in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi; a hoih a citak nasempa aw, a tawmno na zekna-ah siam na hih manin a tampi tak ka hong zeksak ding hi. Hong pai in; kei tawh nuamsa khawm ni,’ a ci hi
Tul khat a ngahpa zong hong pai-in, ‘Topa aw, nang pen na seploh na bawl lohnapi-ah na a deih, mi genhak mahmah na hihna ka hong thei hi
Tua ahih manin ka hong kihta a, leisungah na sum tul khat ka seel hi. Tu-in hih lai-ah na sumzah mah om hi,’ a hong cih ciangin
a topa in, ‘A hoihlo, a thadah nasempa aw, ka seploh ka bawl lohnapi-ah ka deihlam hong thei na hih leh
sumkholna-ah ka sum na koihsak lecin hoih ding hi. Tua hi leh tu-a ka hong tun'kik ciangin a bulpi leh a meet ka ngahkhawm ding hi
Tua ahih manin ama tung panin a tul khat laksak un la, tul sawm a neipa tungah piathuah un
Bang hang hiam cih leh a neisate kipiathuah ding a, hau semsem ding hi. Ahi zongin a neilote tung panin a neihsa sunsun nangawn kilaksak ding hi
Bangmahin a kimanglo hih nasempa ahih leh pualam khuamialna lakah lawnkhia un. Tua lai-ah kapin a hagawi ding hi,’ ci hi. *
“Mihing Tapa a vantung mite tawh Kumpi-in hong paikhawm uh ciangin a kumpi tokhom tungah hong tu ding hi
Ama mai-ah leitung minam khempeuh hong kikhawm ding hi. Gancingpa in tuu leh keelte a khen mah bangin mi khempeuh khen nihin hong koih ding hi
Tuu a bang mite a taklamah koihin, keel a bang mite a veilamah koih ding hi
Tua ciangin Kumpipa in a taklamah a om mite kiangah, ‘Ka Pa in thupha a piak mite aw, hong pai ta un. Leitung piancila kipanin note-a' dingin a kibawlkholsa gamnuam hong luah un
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka gilkial laitakin an nong pia uh a, ka dangtak laitakin tui nong pia uh a, khualmi ka hih laitakin zin nong do uh a
puan neiloin ka om laitakin puan nong guan' uh a, ka cinat laitakin nong veh uh a, ka thongkiat laitakin nong hawh uh hi,’ a ci ding hi
Tua ciangin mihoihte in, ‘Topa aw, cikin na gilkial hong mu-in an hong pia a, cikin na dangtak hong mu-in tui hong pia ka hi uh hiam
Cikin khualmi na hih laitakin hong mu-in zin hong do a, cikin puan neilo na hih laitakin hong mu-in puan hong guan' ka hi uh hiam
Cikin cina na hih laitakin hong mu-in hong veh a, cikin thongkia na hih laitakin hong mu-in hong hawh ka hi uh hiam?’ a ci ding uh hi
Tua ciangin Kumpipa in amaute kiangah, ‘Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Hih ka sanggamte a neupen khat nangawn na limbawl uh ciangin kei tungah a hong bawl na hi uh hi,’ ci-in a dawng ding hi
“Tua ciangin a veilamah a om mite kiangah, ‘Pasian in a samsiat mite aw, keima kiang panin paikhia un la, Dawimangpa leh a nungzuite-a' dingin a kibawl meikuang tawntung sungah pai un
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka gilkial laitakin an nong pia kei uh a, ka dangtak laitakin tui nong pia kei uh a
khualmi ka hih laitakin zin nong do kei uh a, puan ka neihloh laitakin puan nong guan' kei uh a, ka cinat laitakin nong veh kei uh a, ka thongkiat laitakin nong hawh kei uh hi,’ a ci ding hi

Tua ciangin amaute in zong, ‘Topa aw, cikin na gilkial hong mu a, cikin na dangtak hong mu a, cikin khualmi na hih hong mu a, cikin na puan neihloh hong mu a, cikin na cinat hong mu a, cikin na thongkiat hong mu a, cikin kote in nang hong huh nuamlo ka hi uh hiam?’ a ci ding uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Hih mite a neupen khat nangawn na huhloh uh ciangin kei a hong huhlo na hi uh hi,’ ci-in a dawng ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin tawntung gimthuakna sungah amaute pai ding uh a, mihoihte ahih leh nuntak tawntungna sungah lut ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
